cleaned_html_body:
Dear Revise Clothing Team,

Thank you for your response and interest in learning more about Arooj Enterprises. We are a premier textile manufacturer based in Pakistan with over a decade of experience supplying high-quality, sustainable knitwear to global brands. Our state-of-the-art facilities allow us to produce up to 150,000 units per month, ensuring consistency, cost-effectiveness, and prompt delivery.

We are proud to hold internationally recognized certifications, including ISO 14001, SEDEX, and OEKO-TEX, which underscore our commitment to ethical and sustainable production practices. Our product range includes knitted shirts, dresses, T-shirts, trousers, and more, designed to align with the latest market trends and tailored to meet your specific needs.

I would be delighted to share samples of our products for your consideration. Kindly provide a convenient shipping address, and I will promptly arrange this.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,

Asad Irfan | Senior Marketing Manager | Arooj Enterprises | www.texbase.com
